title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE's DJ VIDEO🎧
【imaginary big trip】
Trip to rio, havana, L.A and paris with claudia & bonita.

今回はPatty Austin - Havana CandyからThe 5th Dimension - Sea & Skyへの繋ぎのシーンをお届け。
世界各地のドリーミーな曲を詰め合わせたDJセットで、PENTHOUSE GROOVE流のミュージックジャーニーをお楽しみください。

This time, we’re sharing a transition scene from Patty Austin’s “Havana Candy” to The 5th Dimension’s “Sea & Sky.”
Enjoy a PENTHOUSE GROOVE-style music journey through a DJ set packed with dreamy tracks from around the world.
